name: Wordsearch Attack
short_description: Take words to a new dimension. Find words on 2D boards, hexagonal boards, or wrapped around 3D boards.
detailed_description:
WORDSEARCH ATTACK

Find the list of words hidden on the board.

Wordsearch games stimulate memory and observational skills, improve concentration, patience and persistence and can help develop problem solving skills.
That's because you need to remember what you are looking for, make a strategy of how you are going to tackle finding the words, and execute your plan.
They are also a relaxing distraction, or a frustrating challenge - depending on your point of view.


Some features of the WORDSEARCH ATTACK game:
  • Choose which list words are taken from.
  • Choose the minimum/maximum size of the words to find.
  • Words are procedurally placed and randomly hidden in boards of letters (depending on the word list that you chose, the board may also contain numbers). This allows for endless replayability.
  • Choose between the boards having discretely placed words or overlapping words.
  • 3D boards.
    • Cuboid shaped boards (up to 100x100x100 cubes).
    • Cylinder shaped boards (up to 100 cell circumference).
    • Hexagonal boards (up to 100x100 hexagons).
    • Pre-shaped boards, e.g. pyramid shape, towers, hexagonal prismatic cellulations (i.e. basalt columns) etc.
  • Find words horizontally, vertically, diagonally*, forwards, backwards, around corners...
  • Select the first cell/letter of a word in the list, and then the last cell/letter of that same word, and it's marked off. Examples of how to do this are by clicking on the two cells in that order, click-dragging from the first to last cell, clicking on the last cell then double clicking on the first cell.
  • Various mouse, keyboard and touch screen supports.
  • You can play against the clock or not have a clock and just take your time.
  • Progress saves when you exit, come back later to finish a board. You don't need to solve a board in a single session.
  • Finish the board by finding all the words in the list.

Notes
This game is a version of the wordsearch game that is integrated into the Word Attack game suite. Additional to this game, the version in Word Attack can utilise the Voxel designer so you can create your own boards, as well as having workshop support (it also includes a number of other types of game). There should be little to no reason to buy this game if you already have the full Word Attack. You can upgrade from Wordsearch Attack to Word Attack via the Wordsearch Attack to Word Attack upgrade bundle.

* Boards with hexagons do not place words "diagonally", words on hexagons are placed along the 3 primary axis of the hexagon.
